name: Sopa De Tortillas (Tortilla Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tortillas into narrow strips with scissors and set aside to dry.
2. Heat oil in a casserole.
3. Cook garlic clove in oil until it is burned black, then remove from the oil.
4. Brown tortilla strips in oil.
5. Add tomato puree, onion, parsley, chili powder, bay leaf, and 2 cups water to the pot.
6. Simmer for about 15 minutes or until the tortilla strips are soft and the soup is almost dry.
7. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
